title: OpenAI’s existential questions
summary: OpenAI's recent acquisitions are the subject of discussion on the Equity podcast, which examines whether these moves address significant existential challenges facing the company. The acquisitions appear to be strategic attempts to address critical problems that may affect OpenAI's long-term viability.
content: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.

zh.title: OpenAI的存在性问题
zh.summary: OpenAI最近的收购是《Equity》播客讨论的主题，该播客探讨这些举措是否能够解决公司面临的重大存在性挑战。这些收购似乎是试图解决可能影响OpenAI长期生存能力的关键问题。

title: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket
summary: Blue Origin successfully launched and landed the first stage of its reusable New Glenn rocket for the second time, marking a significant milestone for Jeff Bezos's reusable launch vehicle program. However, the mission partially failed when the rocket's second stage delivered AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird 7 satellite to a lower orbit than expected, rendering it nonfunctional.
content:
Liftoff. | Anadolu via Getty Images	

Today's launch of AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird 7 satellite aboard Blue Origin's reusable New Glenn rocket was a partial success. The New Glenn touched down on its landing pad without incident, making it the second launch and landing for the first stage booster, and officially giving Jeff Bezos a reusable launch vehicle. Unfortunately for AST SpaceMobile, the mission was less successful. Its cell-tower-in-space was delivered to a lower orbit than expected by the second stage of the launch vehicle, rendering it functionally useless.
In a statement, the company said:
While the satellite separated from the launch vehicle and powered on, the alt …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 蓝色起源成功重复使用新格伦火箭
zh.summary: 蓝色起源成功发射并着陆了其可重复使用的新格伦火箭的第一级，这是第二次成功，标志着杰夫·贝索斯可重复使用发射车计划的重大里程碑。但是，当火箭第二级将AST SpaceMobile的BlueBird 7卫星送入比预期更低的轨道时，任务部分失败，导致该卫星无法运行。

title: Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
summary: Vercel, a major web app development platform, suffered a security breach with attackers claiming to be from ShinyHunters attempting to sell stolen employee data and customer information. The company confirmed the incident was caused by a compromised third-party AI tool, though it did not identify which vendor was involved.
content:
Vercel, a major development platform that hosts and deploys web apps, was compromised, and the hackers are attempting to sell stolen data. A person claiming to be a member of ShinyHunters, which was behind the recent hack of Rockstar Games, posted some data online, including employee names, email addresses, and activity time stamps. Vercel confirmed in a post on X that a "security incident" had occurred, and that it impacted a "limited subset" of its customers. Vercel said that a compromised third-party AI tool was the avenue for attack, though it did not specify which third-party was involved.


We've identified a security incident that inv …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 云开发平台Vercel遭黑客攻击
zh.summary: 主要网络应用开发平台Vercel遭遇安全漏洞，攻击者声称来自ShinyHunters，试图出售被盗的员工数据和客户信息。该公司证实该事件是由受损的第三方AI工具引起的，但未披露涉及哪个供应商。

title: The 12-month window
summary: Many AI startups currently thrive because large foundation models have not yet entered their specific market categories, but this window of opportunity is temporary. As broader AI models continue to expand their capabilities, these specialized startups will face increasing competition from larger players.
content: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.

zh.title: 12个月的窗口
zh.summary: 许多AI初创公司目前蓬勃发展，因为大型基础模型尚未进入其特定的市场类别，但这个机会窗口是暂时的。随着更广泛的AI模型继续扩展其能力，这些专业初创公司将面临来自大型参与者的日益激烈的竞争。

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn put a customer satellite in the wrong orbit during its third launch
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket placed a customer satellite in an incorrect orbit during its third launch, marking the system's first major failure. This incident could delay Blue Origin's plans to support NASA and the Trump administration's lunar exploration objectives.
content: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the Moon.

zh.title: 蓝色起源新格伦号在第三次发射时将客户卫星送入错误轨道
zh.summary: 蓝色起源新格伦号火箭在第三次发射中将客户卫星送入了错误的轨道，标志着该系统首次重大失败。这一事件可能会延迟蓝色起源支持NASA和特朗普政府月球探测目标的计划。

title: Robots beat human records at Beijing half-marathon
summary: Robots achieved record-breaking performance at the Beijing half-marathon, significantly improving upon the previous year's fastest robot time of two hours and 40 minutes. The advancement demonstrates rapid progress in robotics technology and athletic performance capabilities.
content: The winning time is a massive improvement over last year’s race, when the fastest robot finished in two hours and 40 minutes.

zh.title: 机器人在北京半程马拉松中打破人类纪录
zh.summary: 机器人在北京半程马拉松中取得了破纪录的成绩，大幅改进了前一年机器人最快成绩两小时四十分钟的记录。这一进步展示了机器人技术和运动性能能力的快速发展。

title: Blue Origin's rocket reuse achievement marred by upper stage failure
summary: Blue Origin successfully reused its first-stage rocket booster, achieving a key reusability milestone, but the mission was undermined by a failure in the New Glenn's upper stage. This mixed result highlights the remaining technical challenges in the company's heavy-lift rocket development.
content: Blue Origin's reused first stage hit its targets, but New Glenn's upper stage did not.

zh.title: 蓝色起源火箭重用成就因上级阶段失败而受损
zh.summary: 蓝色起源成功重用了其一级火箭助推器，实现了关键的重用里程碑，但该任务因新格伦号上级阶段的失败而受阻。这个混合结果突显了该公司重型火箭开发中仍存在的技术挑战。

title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
summary: Palantir has published a statement criticizing inclusivity initiatives and what it calls "regressive" cultures amid increased scrutiny over its work with immigration enforcement agencies and its positioning as a defender of Western values. The move reflects the company's ideological stance and the ongoing debate about corporate values and policy alignment in tech. This highlights tensions between stated corporate principles and the consequences of major government contracts.
content: Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."

zh.title: Palantir发布声明谴责包容性和"衰退"文化
zh.summary: Palantir发布声明，批评包容性倡议和它所谓的"衰退"文化，此举引发了对该公司与移民执法机构合作工作的审视，以及其作为西方价值观捍卫者的定位。此举反映了公司的意识形态立场和关于企业价值观与科技政策协调的持续辩论。这突显了表述的公司原则与重大政府合同后果之间的紧张关系。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber enters its assetmaxxing era
summary: Uber is shifting toward an "assetmaxxing" business model as artificial intelligence plays an increasingly central role in reshaping the transportation industry. The company is exploring new strategies to optimize its asset utilization and leverage AI capabilities. This reflects broader industry trends as major transportation platforms adapt their models to compete in an AI-driven economy.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility：Uber进入其资产最大化时代
zh.summary: 随着人工智能在重塑运输业中发挥越来越核心的作用，Uber正在转向"资产最大化"商业模式。该公司正在探索新的战略来优化其资产利用率并利用人工智能能力。这反映了主要运输平台适应其模式以在人工智能驱动的经济中竞争的更广泛行业趋势。

title: Nothing’s modular CMF Headphone Pro are down to their lowest price to date
summary: Nothing's CMF Headphone Pro wireless headphones have reached their lowest price at $69, down from $99, offering premium features like 100-hour battery life and adaptive noise cancellation typically found in more expensive models. The headphones include physical controls, customizable settings, and modular design with interchangeable cushions in multiple colors. This price point makes high-end audio features accessible at a budget tier.
content:
Over the past several years, Nothing’s budget-centric subsidiary, CMF, has built a reputation for producing attractive, inexpensive products with features often reserved for gadgets that cost twice the price. The CMF Headphone Pro — the company’s first pair of over-ear wireless headphones — fit precisely in that lane, especially now that they’re on sale at Amazon in both light gray and a subtle green shade for an all-time low of $69 ($30 off).
CMF Headphone Pro

Where to Buy:

 $99 $69 at Amazon (light gray)
 $99 $69 at Amazon (green)

Although the Headphone Pro eschew the retro-transparent design found on Nothing wares like the Headphone 1, I wouldn’t necessarily say that’s a bad thing given the polarizing, squared-off design of the latter. Instead, the Pro go all in on the curves, with circular earcups, cushions, and a plush headband. You can also add an additional pop of color with CMF’s $25 interchangeable cushions, which, as of now, are available in either orange or the aforementioned green hue.
Unlike many premium pairs of noise-canceling headphones, the Pro ditch touch-capacitive controls for physical buttons — a plus, as far as I’m concerned — allowing you to control playback, adjust the volume, and tweak a range of other settings using a customizable action button and a multi-function roller. Nothing also includes something called an Energy Slider, so you can adjust the treble and bass balance on the fly without digging into Nothing’s app to make EQ adjustments.
The biggest draw of the Headphone Pro, aside from their adaptive ANC, is that they offer a whopping 100 hours of battery life per charge, ensuring you can travel just about anywhere without having to top them off. That number drops to 50 hours with active noise cancellation enabled; however, that’s still 10 hours more than what you’d get with a higher-end pair like Sony’s WH-1000XM6 and 20 hours more than the latest Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones. The fact that they support Google Fast Pair and

zh.title: Nothing的模块化CMF Headphone Pro降至迄今最低价格
zh.summary: Nothing的CMF Headphone Pro无线耳机降价至$69（从$99下降），提供100小时电池续航和自适应降噪等高级功能，这些功能通常仅在更昂贵的型号中才能找到。耳机配备物理控制、可定制设置和模块化设计，附有多种颜色的可互换耳垫。这个价格点使高端音频功能在预算级别上变得容易获得。

title: The Stars My Destination is classic proto-cyberpunk
summary: Alfred Bester's 1956 sci-fi novel "The Stars My Destination" is widely recognized as a foundational precursor to the cyberpunk genre and remains essential reading for science fiction enthusiasts. The novel features innovative narrative techniques and ergodic elements that are better experienced in physical form than digital versions. The work's continued relevance demonstrates its influence on modern speculative fiction.
content:
Gully Foyle is my name… | Image: Brick Tower Press	

This might feel like a somewhat obvious recommendation to some, but it flew under my radar until now. Alfred Bester's The Stars My Destination (originally published as Tiger! Tiger! in the UK) is a 1956 sci-fi novel that some have cited as a precursor to cyberpunk. It's a work I admit I have some conflicted feelings about, but one I think is well worth reading if you consider yourself a fan of sci-fi. It's also well worth seeking out a physical copy, something I wish I had known before I started reading it in the objectively inferior e-book form that can't capture the ergodic elements of the climax.
It's hard to explain the plot of The Star …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《我的目的地是星辰》是经典的原型赛博朋克小说
zh.summary: Alfred Bester的1956年科幻小说《我的目的地是星辰》被广泛认为是赛博朋克类型的奠基性先驱作品，对科幻爱好者仍然是必读的。这部小说采用了创新的叙述技巧和遍历元素，在纸质形式上的体验优于数字版本。这部作品持续的相关性表明了它对现代推测性小说的影响。

title: Cracks are starting to form on fusion energy’s funding boom
summary: The fusion energy sector is experiencing internal tensions as fundamental disagreements between startups and investors threaten to disrupt the industry's funding momentum and continued growth. Key stakeholders must resolve their differences to prevent deepening divisions within the sector. This tension signals potential challenges ahead despite recent investor enthusiasm for fusion power as a clean energy solution.
content: Fusion startups and investors risk deepening fissures if some key disagreements aren't settled amicably.

zh.title: 核聚变能源融资热潮中开始出现裂痕
zh.summary: 核聚变能源部门因初创公司和投资者之间的根本分歧而经历内部紧张局势，这威胁要破坏该行业的融资势头和持续增长。关键利益相关者必须解决他们的分歧，以防止部门内分裂加深。尽管投资者最近对核聚变作为清洁能源的热情，这种紧张局势预示着前面可能出现的挑战。

title: Marathon battery life makes Keychron’s Ultra 8K keyboards its best yet
summary: Keychron's new Q1 Ultra 8K and V5 Ultra 8K keyboards represent straightforward upgrades to the popular Q and V series, combining extended battery life with improved features for both casual users and keyboard enthusiasts. The V5 Ultra ($119.99) offers a compact 1800-layout design, while the Q1 Ultra ($229.99) provides a premium alternative with enhanced 8K technology.
content:
The Keychron Q1 Ultra 8K in white (left) and the V5 Ultra 8K in black (right). | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Keychron's expansive keyboard catalog covers everything from basic full-size mechanical boards to niche layouts like southpaw Alice or a one-handed half-keyboard for gaming. Its Q and V series are among our go-to recommendations for off-the-shelf keyboards, and the latest iterations - the Q and V Ultra models - are a straightforward upgrade to the lineup, with benefits for regular users and deep-in-the-weeds keyboard nerds alike.
I've been testing two Ultra keyboards: the Keychron V5 Ultra 8K and Keychron Q1 Ultra 8K. The $119.99 V5 Ultra is a near-full-size 1800-layout board with a number pad in a plastic case, while the $229.99 Q1 Ultra i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 持久电池续航让Keychron Ultra 8K键盘成为迄今最佳选择
zh.summary: Keychron的新款Q1 Ultra 8K和V5 Ultra 8K键盘是对热门Q系列和V系列的直接升级,结合了更长的电池续航和改进的功能,适合休闲用户和键盘爱好者。V5 Ultra($119.99)提供紧凑的1800布局设计,而Q1 Ultra($229.99)则提供具有增强8K技术的高端选择。

title: The future of local TV news has taken a Trumpian turn
summary: The FCC has moved to relax ownership regulations that previously prevented any single company from broadcasting to more than 39 percent of US TV households, a change initiated under the Trump administration with new FCC chairman Brendan Carr. This deregulation shift could significantly reshape local TV news ownership and consolidation.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more stories on Big Tech versus politics in Washington, DC, follow Tina Nguyen and read Regulator. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
A long time ago, in 2004, the Federal Communications Commission laid down a rule designed to prevent a monopoly: No one company could broadcast to more than 39 percent of all the TV households in the United States. But then Donald Trump returned to the White House in 2025. Brendan Carr became FCC chairman and immediately kicked off a deregu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 本地电视新闻的未来出现特朗普式的转向
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会(FCC)已放松所有权规定,这些规定此前防止任何单一公司向超过39%的美国电视家庭广播,这一改变由特朗普政府任期内新任FCC主席布伦丹·卡尔发起。这种放松管制的转变可能会显著重塑本地电视新闻的所有权和行业整合。

title: Blue Origin successfully re-uses a New Glenn rocket for the first time ever
summary: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn mega-rocket for the first time, achieving a major milestone that positions the company to challenge SpaceX's dominance in the global launch market. Rocket reusability is critical for reducing launch costs and increasing mission frequency.
content: It's a major milestone for the company's new mega-rocket system, putting it in position to challenge SpaceX's dominance of the global launch market.

zh.title: Blue Origin首次成功重复使用新格伦火箭
zh.summary: Blue Origin首次成功重复使用其新格伦巨型火箭,实现了一个重大里程碑,使该公司能够在全球发射市场上挑战SpaceX的主导地位。火箭可重复使用对于降低发射成本和增加任务频率至关重要。

title: I’ve fired one of America’s most powerful lasers—here’s what a shot day looks like
summary: Researchers successfully tested one of America's most powerful lasers, which is used to study stellar interior physics and advance fusion energy research. The achievement demonstrates the operational capabilities of advanced laser technology in fundamental physics applications.
content: The laser was used to study the physics of stellar interiors and fusion energy, among other things.

zh.title: 我激发了美国最强大的激光之一——发射日是什么样的
zh.summary: 研究人员成功测试了美国最强大的激光之一，该激光用于研究恒星内部物理学和推进核聚变能源研究。这项成就展示了先进激光技术在基础物理学应用中的运行能力。
